metadata.title: Task details | Slashie
metadata.description: View a Slashie task, location context, quotes, and next steps.

notFound.title: Task not found
notFound.description: This task may have been removed or is no longer available.

statusHeader.cancelledSubtext: This task is no longer active.
statusHeader.closedSubtext: This job has been completed and closed.
statusHeader.awardedCustomerHeadline: Worker booked - share your code when done
statusHeader.awardedCustomerSubtext: Coordinate on site, pay them directly, then share your completion code.
statusHeader.awardedWorkerSubtext: You are booked. Complete the work, then enter the code.
statusHeader.awardedDefaultSubtext: This task has been awarded to a worker.
statusHeader.ownerQuotesSubtext: Review each quote and accept the worker you want.
statusHeader.ownerLiveHeadline: Your task is live - reaching workers
statusHeader.ownerLiveSubtext: Nearby workers can see your task. Share it to get quotes faster.
statusHeader.quoteSentSubtext: The customer has your quote. We will notify you of any response.
statusHeader.openQuotesSubtext: Send your price and availability to win this job.
statusHeader.fullSubtext: This task is no longer accepting new quotes.
statusHeader.visitorAuthedSubtext: This task is open for quotes.
statusHeader.visitorGuestSubtext: Sign in as a worker to send a quote.

actions.howPaymentsDescription: You pay (or get paid) directly. Slashie never handles job payment.
actions.reportReceivedDescription: Thanks — our safety team will review this task.
actions.cancelConfirm: Cancel this task? Professionals will no longer be able to send quotes.

trust.workerHeading: You get paid by the customer directly
trust.ownerBody: Slashie never handles job payment. Agree a price and pay your worker directly. Quotes and bookings happen here, money does not.
trust.workerBody: Slashie never handles job payment. Agree a price and get paid by the customer directly. Quotes and bookings happen here, money does not.

quotes.heading: Quotes

subtitles.C1: Workers can send quotes while your task is open.
subtitles.C2: Workers can send quotes while your task is open.
subtitles.C3: Workers can send quotes while your task is open.
subtitles.C4: Workers can send quotes while your task is open.
subtitles.W1: Sign in to send a quote.
subtitles.W2: Become a worker to compete on this task.
subtitles.W3: Be the first to quote — customers compare price and availability.
subtitles.W4: See what others are bidding — then send yours.
subtitles.W8: This task is not accepting new quotes.

quotes.emptyOwnerCaption: Nearby workers usually respond within 24 hours.
quotes.emptyWorkerCaption: Be the first worker to make an offer on this task.
quotes.joinAsWorker: Join as a worker to quote on tasks.
quotes.submitQuoteCaption: Add your price, availability, and a message for the customer.
quotes.seeJobBanner: See job banner for address & code.
quotes.choseAnother: Customer chose another worker for this task.
quotes.maxQuotesAccepted: The customer has accepted the maximum number of worker quotes.

card.noMessage: No message provided with this quote.

booking.step1: 1. Coordinate on site with your worker.
booking.step2: 2. Pay them directly when you agree (outside Slashie).
booking.step3: 3. When satisfied, give them the completion code below so they can close the job on Slashie.
booking.codePending: Your completion code will appear here shortly.
booking.codePrivateHint: Only you can see this code. Do not share it until the work is done.
booking.codeCopiedDescription: Share this 6-digit code with your worker when the job is done.
booking.codeCopyFailedDescription: Select and copy the code manually.
booking.workerTitle: You are booked for this job
booking.flexibleSchedule: Agree timing with the customer if the schedule is flexible.
booking.paymentNote: Payment is arranged directly with the customer outside Slashie.

verification.inactiveBody: This order is no longer active. Refresh the page or contact support if something looks wrong.
verification.instructions: When the customer is happy with the work and has paid you directly, ask them for their 6-digit completion code. Enter it here to close the job on Slashie.

order.disclaimer: Job payment stays between you and your worker. Slashie records completion for your history only.

provider.taskNotLoaded: Task details are not loaded yet.
provider.needWorkerProfile: Create a worker profile before submitting quotes.
provider.notAcceptingQuotes: This task is no longer accepting new quotes.
provider.verifyEmailBeforeQuote: Verify your email before sending quotes. Check your inbox or resend from the banner.
provider.quoteFailed: Quote submission failed. Please try again.
provider.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from the customer.
provider.jobClosedDescription: Payment and completion are recorded. This order is now closed.
provider.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Check with the customer and try again.

metadata.title: 任務詳情 | Slashie
metadata.description: 查看 Slashie 任務、地點內容、報價和下一步。

notFound.title: 找不到任務
notFound.description: 此任務可能已移除或不再可用。

statusHeader.awardedCustomerHeadline: 已預訂工作者 — 完成後分享驗證碼
statusHeader.awardedCustomerSubtext: 現場協調，直接付款，然後分享完成驗證碼。
statusHeader.awardedWorkerSubtext: 你已獲預訂。完成工作後輸入驗證碼。
statusHeader.ownerQuotesHeadline: {count} 個報價 — 比較並接受
statusHeader.ownerQuotesHeadlinePlural: {count} 個報價 — 比較並接受
statusHeader.ownerQuotesSubtext: 查看每個報價，接受你想要的工作者。
statusHeader.ownerLiveHeadline: 你的任務已上線 — 正在觸達工作者
statusHeader.ownerLiveSubtext: 附近工作者可以看到你的任務。分享可更快收到報價。
statusHeader.quoteSentSubtext: 顧客已收到你的報價。有回覆時我們會通知你。
statusHeader.openQuotesWithCountHeadline: 開放報價中 — 目前 {count} 個
statusHeader.openQuotesSubtext: 送出你的價格與檔期以爭取此工作。
statusHeader.fullSubtext: 此任務已不再接受新報價。
statusHeader.visitorGuestSubtext: 請以工作者身分登入以傳送報價。

actions.howPaymentsDescription: 你直接付款（或收款）。Slashie 從不處理工作款項。
actions.reportReceivedDescription: 謝謝 — 我們的安全團隊會審核此任務。
actions.cancelConfirm: 取消此任務？專業人士將無法再傳送報價。

details.heading: 任務詳情
details.viewsColdStart: 新任務 — 正在觸達工作者

trust.ownerBody: Slashie 從不處理工作款項。議定價格後直接向工作者付款。報價與預訂在此完成，金錢往來不經平台。
trust.workerBody: Slashie 從不處理工作款項。議定價格後由顧客直接付款給你。報價與預訂在此完成，金錢往來不經平台。

quotes.heading: 報價

subtitles.C1: 任務開放期間，工作者可以傳送報價。
subtitles.C2: 任務開放期間，工作者可以傳送報價。
subtitles.C3: 任務開放期間，工作者可以傳送報價。
subtitles.C4: 任務開放期間，工作者可以傳送報價。
subtitles.W2: 成為工作者即可競投此任務。
subtitles.W3: 成為第一個報價 — 顧客會比較價格與檔期。
subtitles.W4: 先看看其他人的出價 — 再送出你的。
subtitles.W8: 此任務已不再接受新報價。

quotes.slotsFilled: 已填滿 {filled} / {cap} 個工作者名額
quotes.emptyOwnerCaption: 附近工作者通常會在 24 小時內回覆。
quotes.emptyWorkerCaption: 成為第一個為此任務出價的工作者。
quotes.joinAsWorker: 加入成為工作者即可報價。
quotes.submitQuoteCaption: 加入你的價格、檔期，以及給顧客的訊息。
quotes.pendingReviewing: 待處理 · 顧客審核中
quotes.seeJobBanner: 請查看工作橫幅以取得地址與驗證碼。
quotes.choseAnother: 顧客為此任務選擇了另一位工作者。
quotes.maxQuotesAccepted: 顧客已接受上限數量的工作者報價。

booking.step2: 2. 雙方同意後直接付款（不經 Slashie）。
booking.step3: 3. 滿意後把下方完成驗證碼交給他們，以便在 Slashie 關閉工作。
booking.codePending: 你的完成驗證碼稍後會顯示在這裡。
booking.codePrivateHint: 只有你能看到此驗證碼。工作完成前請勿分享。
booking.codeCopiedDescription: 工作完成後把此 6 位數字驗證碼分享給你的工作者。
booking.codeCopyFailedDescription: 請手動選取並複製驗證碼。
booking.flexibleSchedule: 若時間彈性，請與顧客協調。
booking.paymentNote: 付款由你與顧客在 Slashie 以外直接安排。

verification.inactiveBody: 此訂單已不再活躍。如有問題請重新整理或聯絡支援。
verification.instructions: 當顧客滿意工作並已直接付款後，向他們索取 6 位數字完成驗證碼，在此輸入以關閉 Slashie 上的工作。
verification.submit: 提交驗證碼並關閉工作

order.disclaimer: 工作款項由你與工作者自行處理。Slashie 只記錄完成狀態供你查閱。

provider.quotesLoading: 仍在載入報價 — 請稍候。
provider.needWorkerProfile: 提交報價前請先建立工作者檔案。
provider.notAcceptingQuotes: 此任務已不再接受新報價。
provider.verifyEmailBeforeQuote: 傳送報價前請先驗證電郵。請檢查收件匣或從橫幅重新傳送。
provider.quoteFailed: 報價提交失敗，請再試一次。
provider.enterCode: 請輸入顧客提供的 6 位數字驗證碼。
provider.jobClosedDescription: 付款與完成已記錄。此訂單現已關閉。
provider.invalidCode: 驗證碼無效或已過期。請向顧客確認後再試。
